site.title: dartpilot — Flutter/Dart Open Source
site.description: Open-source templates and tools for the Flutter/Dart ecosystem. Production-ready, clean architecture, BLoC pattern.

hero.title: Build production-ready Flutter apps, faster.
hero.subtitle: Open-source templates and tools for the Flutter/Dart ecosystem

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.architectureDesc: Modular, scalable project structure with clear boundaries between features, domain, and infrastructure layers.
features.blocDesc: Predictable state management with BLoC pattern, use cases, and equatable states.
features.authDesc: Complete authentication flow with role-based access control out of the box.
features.responsiveDesc: 14+ reusable components, adaptive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
features.i18nDesc: Built-in i18n support with ARB files and code generation.
features.mockDesc: Develop and test with mock data — no backend required.
features.cicdDesc: GitHub Actions for build, test, and deployment automation.

platforms.title: One codebase, six platforms
platforms.subtitle: Build once, deploy everywhere with full platform support.

getStarted.title: Clone. Run. Ship.
getStarted.subtitle: Get up and running in under a minute.

community.title: Built by the community, for the community
community.subtitle: Join the growing dartpilot community and help shape the future of Flutter development.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Open-source tools and templates for the Flutter/Dart ecosystem.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Guides, references, and resources to help you build with dartpilot templates.
docs.deepwikiDesc: AI-powered documentation explorer for the entire codebase.

communityPage.title: Community
communityPage.subtitle: dartpilot is built by developers who care about quality Flutter tooling.

blog.subtitle: Updates, tutorials, and insights from the dartpilot team.

about.title: About dartpilot
about.mission: Our mission is to accelerate Flutter development by providing production-ready, open-source templates and tools that follow best practices.
about.author: Created by
about.authorBio: Software engineer passionate about Flutter, clean architecture, and open-source development.
